payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72. He still listens to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane. They also plan to catch up about AI infra, and Sam asked to receive the article.
citations: Daniele - Still at Goldman? Sam - No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72
Daniele - Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam - Yes, but lately more early Coltrane
Daniele - We should catch up about AI infra Sam - Definitely, send me that article
payload.decision: Store the new stable facts about Sam’s job change and music preferences; keep the AI-infra follow-up as a pending conversational action.

entity_resolution.reason: The transcript does not provide enough evidence to resolve Sam or Daniele to a durable existing entity record beyond the conversation context.

payload.intent: Compile durable personal-memory updates and follow-up context from the conversation.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said he left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans, but lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam planned to catch up about AI infrastructure, and Sam asked to be sent the article.

details: Captured one music-preference update with cautious confidence.

repair_options: If needed, mark Sam’s employment as Point72 and Goldman as former employer.
If needed, attach a follow-up task to send the AI infra article to Sam.
